tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1 — Wolof]
Bi ngay door ci Teranga suuf
Kora bi di wax baat yu yàgg
Garab gi taxaw ci biir ndox
Sunu maam yi naan nanu ci jamm

[Pre-Chorus — Wolof]
Yallah nanu jokk ci benn xel
Teranga mooy sunu bopp

[Chorus — English]
Senegal, land of Teranga
Where the kora sings at dawn
Rivers deep and baobabs tall
In your soil our spirits are born
Senegal, land of Teranga

[Verse 2 — Wolof]
Dakar taxaw ci gééj gi
Saint-Louis di fes ci ngelaw
Casamance moy rab gi
Senegaal, suma réew, suma mbokk

[Chorus — English]
Senegal, land of Teranga
Where the kora sings at dawn
Rivers deep and baobabs tall
In your soil our spirits are born
Senegal, land of Teranga

[Outro — Wolof]
Senegaal, ba fàww, suma Teranga

tracks.title: 🇸🇳 Teranga — Land of Hospitality | Senegaal, Suuf bu Neex — Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
Du Lac Rose aux baobabs de Casamance — l'âme du Sénégal en musique. 🇸🇳

Ndax Senegaal mooy réew Teranga — parce que le Sénégal est la terre de l'hospitalité. Kora, sabar, tama et la voix du griot racontent la beauté de cette terre d'Afrique de l'Ouest.

From the shores of Dakar to the sacred baobabs — Senegal's griot tradition meets cinematic soundscape.

00:00 — Kora sunrise
01:20 — English chorus
02:50 — Sabar solo
03:40 — Griot farewell

#SenegaleseMusic #Senegal #Teranga #Kora #Mbalax #WorldMusic #AfricanMusic #GriotTradition #AIMusic #AssiremMusicProd #NoCopyright #WestAfrica
